class.name: PlayFabCloudScript
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.cloud_script[/code]. This generated service wraps client-safe PlayFab client and entity CloudScript execution APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: execute_cloud_script_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCloudScriptClientExecuteCloudScript[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: execute_entity_cloud_script_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCloudScriptExecuteEntityCloudScript[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: execute_function_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFCloudScriptExecuteFunction[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
